overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a sunlit urban sidewalk beneath elevated highways in Night City. The player passes by benches with seated NPCs, moving vehicles, and transitions into the shadow of an overpass while encountering pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit elevated highway sidewalk with benches

events.description: red van passes by on the right side of the road
approaching the shadow cast by the elevated overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing by seated NPCs on concrete benches

notable_agents.action: sitting on concrete bench facing the street

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the scene ahead
long concrete bench with NPCs seated on it
tall digital billboard with colorful graphics and NCPD signage
tall metal utility pole with wires and fixtures
pile of garbage bags and debris next to the bench

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban sidewalk in a futuristic city, with the camera walking past a concrete bench where an NPC sits. Digital billboards and elevated highway structures dominate the background while vehicles pass by on the right. The lighting is bright and direct as the camera approaches the shadow of the overpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway overpass

events.description: enters the shadow of the elevated overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker
black car drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass deck, approaching pedestrians walking ahead

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera under the overpass shadow

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway above
metal construction barriers and fencing along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to darker mixed lighting. Massive concrete support pillars become prominent as the camera walks beneath the highway deck. Pedestrians are visible ahead walking in the same direction, and vehicles continue to pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded pedestrian walkway under overpass with construction scaffolding

events.description: passes by pedestrian in pink and white outfit walking on the right
passes by pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking through the deeply shaded area under the overpass, passing by multiple pedestrians moving in opposing directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink and white outfit walking past the camera
pedestrian in dark coat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structure with yellow safety barriers on the left side
tall modern glass skyscraper visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking under the overpass in low light conditions, passing by pedestrians moving in opposing directions. Construction scaffolding appears on the left while distant glass towers become visible ahead. The environment remains shaded and sheltered beneath the massive concrete highway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic urban sidewalk that transitions from bright, direct sunlight into the deep shadows of a massive highway overpass. It begins by moving past a concrete bench and digital billboards under a clear sky, with vehicles streaming by on the right. As the camera advances, the lighting shifts abruptly from brilliant gold to a darker, muted tone upon entering the shadow cast by the elevated highway deck. The scene then expands beneath the heavy concrete support pillars, passing pedestrians and construction scaffolding while the environment remains sheltered and dim. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory through the shaded underpass, revealing distant glass towers emerging ahead in the city skyline.
